note: Clean, high-contrast synthetic roots with an EXACT known answer — for a first run, teaching, and smoke-testing. Drawn at 100 px/cm with a 2 cm scale bar; calibrate with 'Manual — click 2 points' on the bar (enter 20 mm).

files.label: ▸ Synthetic: straight root (known answer)
files.note: One vertical primary, 10.00 cm at 100 px/cm. Endpoints=2 (1 growing tip + seed end). Calibrate: Manual 2-pt on the two ends, enter 100 mm.

files.label: ▸ Synthetic: fishbone (6 laterals, known answer)
files.note: Vertical primary 8.00 cm + 6 laterals x 2.00 cm = 20.00 cm total. 6 T-junctions => 6 branch points. Endpoints=8 (7 growing tips + seed end). Calibrate: Manual 2-pt on the primary's ends, enter 80 mm.

files.label: Synthetic fishbone — RSML (archiDART traits, known answer)
files.note: Same geometry as synthetic_fishbone.png, as RSML. TRL=20.00 cm, 1 primary + 6 laterals. Load via Dashboard sample picker or 'Import RSML'.
